scripts.clean: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); ['dist'].forEach(d => fs.rmSync(d, {recursive: true, force: true}));"
scripts.clean:out: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); ['out'].forEach(d => fs.rmSync(d, {recursive: true, force: true}));"
scripts.package:win: npm run build && electron-forge make --platform win32 --arch x64
scripts.package:win-arm64: npm run build && electron-forge make --platform win32 --arch arm64
scripts.package:linux: npm run build && npx electron-builder --linux AppImage --x64
scripts.package:linux-arm64: npm run build && npx electron-builder --linux AppImage --arm64
scripts.package:mac-arm: npm run build && electron-forge package --platform darwin --arch arm64
scripts.package:mac-intel: npm run build && electron-forge package --platform darwin --arch x64
scripts.package:mac-universal: npm run build && electron-forge package --platform darwin --arch universal
scripts.package:all: npm run package:win && npm run package:win-arm64 && npm run package:linux && npm run package:linux-arm64 && npm run package:mac-arm && npm run package:mac-intel
